======== PHASE 1: GATHER (before we delete anything) ========
=== Sakura: exact config keys we need to preserve (non-telegram) ===
--- hermes-gateway.service (non-telegram env vars) ---
[Unit]
Description=Hermes Agent Gateway - Messaging Platform Integration
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=jose
WorkingDirectory=/home/jose/.hermes
EnvironmentFile=/home/jose/.hermes/.env
Environment="HERMES_HOME=/home/jose/.hermes"
ExecStart=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python -m hermes_cli.main gateway run
StandardOutput=append:/tmp/hermes.log
StandardError=append:/tmp/hermes.log
TimeoutStopSec=210
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=600

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

--- config.yaml: model + ollama settings ---
model:
  provider: ollama
  default: llama3.2:latest
  ollama_host: http://192.168.0.39:11434
providers:
  ollama:
  provider: edge
  provider: local
  provider: ''
  provider: ''
  base_url: ''

--- config.yaml: allowed_users (non-telegram) ---
    user_id: ''

=== Remy: exact config keys we need to preserve (non-telegram) ===
model primary: {'primary': 'ollama/llama3.2:latest'}
ollama baseUrl: http://192.168.0.39:11434
channels (non-telegram): ['whatsapp']
gateway port: 9119
gateway bind: lan
